title: Design System: Beads Backend Integration Reference

display.purpose: Document title only — appears once. Compressed letterspacing closes Inter 800's optical gaps at large sizes.

body.purpose: Prose in summaries, gap cards, decision option text. Not used in tables.

label.purpose: All metadata: eyebrows, table headers, chip text, footer, header meta. The monospace gatekeeping rule — if it is metadata, it passes through JetBrains Mono.

motion.name: toc-hover
motion.purpose: TOC link color transition on hover. The only transition in the document.

components.name: Layer Chip — Agents
components.description: Identifies content touching the agents/ layer. Purple/violet hue, icon-leading, monospace text.
components.css: .ds-layer-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 3px 8px 3px 5px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-mat-icon { font-family: 'Material Symbols Outlined'; font-size: 13px; vertical-align: -2px; font-weight: normal; font-style: normal; } .ds-lc-agents { background: oklch(96% 0.025 280); border-color: oklch(78% 0.06 280); color: oklch(35% 0.10 280); }

components.name: Layer Chip — Skills
components.description: Identifies content touching the skills/ layer. Green hue.
components.css: .ds-layer-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 3px 8px 3px 5px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-mat-icon { font-family: 'Material Symbols Outlined'; font-size: 13px; vertical-align: -2px; font-weight: normal; font-style: normal; } .ds-lc-skills { background: oklch(96% 0.025 145); border-color: oklch(75% 0.07 145); color: oklch(30% 0.12 145); }

components.name: Fidelity Cell — Direct
components.description: Table cell indicating a 1:1 beads mapping with no data loss. Green background fill, always font-weight 500.
components.css: td.ds-cell-direct { background: oklch(89% 0.07 145); color: oklch(28% 0.12 145); font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(94% 0.003 250); vertical-align: top; }

components.name: Fidelity Cell — Gap
components.description: Table cell indicating no beads equivalent exists. Red background fill.
components.css: td.ds-cell-gap { background: oklch(88% 0.05 18); color: oklch(28% 0.10 12); font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(94% 0.003 250); vertical-align: top; }

components.name: Priority Chip — High
components.description: Signals high-impact or large-scope work. Outline-only, soft violet. Used in decision criticality and audit impact tables.
components.css: .ds-priority-chip { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid; background: transparent; } .ds-priority-high { border-color: oklch(70% 0.04 300); color: oklch(38% 0.08 300); } .ds-priority-high:hover { background: oklch(97% 0.018 300); }

components.name: Size Chip
components.description: Inline complexity tag appended to checklist task titles. Muted, minimal. Values: S, M, L, XL.
components.css: .ds-size-chip { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 1px 7px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid oklch(89% 0.005 250); color: oklch(56% 0.01 250); margin-left: 4px; background: transparent; }

components.name: Info Callout
components.description: Contextual architecture note at the top of an open phase accordion. No heading, no icon, no accent. A block of context text in a Proof Copy panel.
components.html: Architecture: BeadsTaskProvider composes over BeadsBackend (Phase 1) and BeadsArtifactProvider (Phase 2). Constructor: BeadsTaskProvider(issue_backend, doc_backend).
components.css: .ds-info-callout { font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(42% 0.01 250); background: oklch(97% 0.005 250); border: 1px solid oklch(89% 0.005 250); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-info-callout code { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.82em; background: oklch(99% 0.002 250); border: 1px solid oklch(89% 0.005 250); border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 5px; }

components.name: Coverage Status — Full
components.description: Inline status indicator used in tables. Icon + text, both in Direct Green. Signals complete coverage or no change required.
components.css: .ds-cov-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-mat-icon { font-family: 'Material Symbols Outlined'; font-size: 15px; vertical-align: -2px; font-weight: normal; font-style: normal; } .ds-cov-full { color: oklch(28% 0.12 145); } .ds-cov-partial { color: oklch(30% 0.10 75); } .ds-cov-none { color: oklch(28% 0.10 12); }

narrative.overview:
A proof sheet is the last document before the press run — every mark is deliberate, every color is coded, every column earns its place. This reference document is that artifact: the technical record a developer opens to resolve a single question and closes in under ten seconds.

The aesthetic is that of precision technical publishing — Inter at high weights for editorial authority, JetBrains Mono for all metadata and labels, OKLCH-calibrated tonal neutrals that read as paper under daylight. Color in this system is exclusively semantic.

This system explicitly rejects: the rendered GitHub Markdown look, and the Notion/Confluence wiki aesthetic.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal neutrals as the base; chromatic color only for data
Monospace type carries all metadata, labels, and secondary structure
No shadows; elevation is a 2-point lightness step
Fidelity traffic light is the primary navigational signal
Tables are the primary layout unit; cards are used once (decision options)

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Each color family carries exactly one semantic meaning throughout the document. Green means Direct/Full/No-Change. Orange means Bridge/Partial/Flag. Red means Gap/Missing. Violet means Decision. Lime means Bridge-work.

rules.name: The Tonal Proof Rule
rules.body: Every surface in this document can be identified by lightness alone: 99% is the page, 97% is elevated, 89%–94% is a hairline or near-invisible separator.

rules.name: The Monospace Gatekeeping Rule
rules.body: If it is a label, a number in a data role, a command name, a status tag, or any piece of metadata, it passes through JetBrains Mono. Prose never appears in monospace.

rules.name: The Shadow Embargo
rules.body: No box-shadow appears in this document. If an element needs more presence, increase its border weight or use a colored border from the fidelity or layer taxonomy.

rules.name: The No-Chrome Rule
rules.body: No component uses border-left or border-right as an accent stripe. No glassmorphism. No gradient fills. If an element needs chromatic emphasis, use a full background tint from the established semantic palette.

dos: Use fidelity cell colors exclusively to signal mapping fidelity — never borrow these for other purposes
Run all labels, table headers, eyebrows, chip text, command names, and metadata through JetBrains Mono
Keep Inter at weights 600–800 for headings; at smaller sizes (below 16px), Inter 400 or 500 only
Add new layer types using the existing chip pattern: assign a hue, derive background at 96% lightness
Use proof-copy (97%) as the background for any elevated container (code block, info panel, pre element)
donts: Don't render this like GitHub Flavored Markdown — no plain-list tables, no undifferentiated rows
Don't introduce the Notion or Confluence wiki aesthetic: no emoji-led bullet lists, no pastel callout card grids
Don't add box-shadow to any component — the Shadow Embargo is absolute
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on any element
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) — emphasis via weight or size only
Don't add decorative sections: no hero metrics, no illustration panels, no ornamental color blocks
Don't borrow fidelity traffic-light hues outside of fidelity cells and coverage-status chips
Don't borrow layer taxonomy hues outside of layer chips and the layer legend
